summary: Matrix-sourced recording with crisp sound captures a great setlist, highlighted by the surprise performance of "Death Don't Have No Mercy".
review: Both reviewers praise the show’s strong setlist and solid playing, noting the unexpected cover of “Death Don't Have No Mercy” as a highlight. The matrix restoration cleans up the raw SBD flaws, delivering an excellent‑quality listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: High marks for both performance (great setlist, good playing) and recording (matrix cleanup praised as 'killer'), yielding a strong combined score despite only two reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix mix cleans up flaws of the raw soundboard, resulting in clear and crisp audio; reviewers describe it as 'killer' and a successful restoration.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a nice mix of songs and good playing throughout, describing the setlist as great.
